steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage lists the mother’s, then the father’s, then the daughter’s viewpoint, showing that each perspective comes from a different family member.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A, “distinct,” means different or separate, which exactly matches the idea of three separate viewpoints.
The other three either suggest something not implied (unknown, unintended) or impose an obligation (required) that the passage does not mention.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
